message:
feat(store): emit 'evicted' keyspace notification on maxmemory eviction

When run_bounded_eviction_loop() evicts a key due to maxmemory pressure,
it now emits NOTIFY_EVICTED keyspace notification via pub/sub.

This completes the keyspace notification coverage:
- Write commands → type-specific notifications (set, del, lpush, etc.)
- Lazy expiry → NOTIFY_EXPIRED ("expired")
- Maxmemory eviction → NOTIFY_EVICTED ("evicted")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
